findings.location: s4 — ログ出力設定 / log.properties
findings.description: The log.properties code block in the knowledge file is a partial extraction of the source example (4 lines out of 11). Missing lines include: `loggerFactory.className=nablarch.core.log.basic.BasicLoggerFactory`, `writerNames=stdout,nop`, `writer.stdout.className=nablarch.core.log.basic.StandardOutputLogWriter`, `availableLoggersNamesOrder=sql,root`, `loggers.root.nameRegex=.*`, `loggers.root.level=DEBUG`, and `loggers.root.writerNames=stdout`. Notably, `writerNames=stdout,nop` is required to declare the `nop` writer referenced by `loggers.sql.writerNames=nop`, and `availableLoggersNamesOrder=sql,root` controls evaluation order — both are needed to implement the feature correctly.
findings.source_evidence: Source log.properties block contains 11 configuration lines forming a complete working example; knowledge file retains only 4: writer.nop.className, loggers.sql.nameRegex, loggers.sql.level, loggers.sql.writerNames.
